[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010101 3
1 1101101 5
2 1110101 5
3 1001111 5
4 1101100 4
5 1111111 a
6 0111110 5
7 1111111 a

01 10 1111100 5

23 32 0111110 5 match 6
34 43 0111110 5 match 6
45 54 0111100 4
56 65 0011100 3
67 76 1011011 5
70 07 1010111 5

13 31 1111110 6
24 42 0111110 5 match 6

57 75 1011111 6
60 06 0001100 2
71 17 1111111 a match 5 7
